description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a CARGO_HOME variable set to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/cargo and uses a cache on the paths target/ and cargo/. Add two test jobs named test:1.24.1 and test:latest (default test stage) that use the rust:1.24.1 and rust:latest images respectively and execute the script: mkdir target || echo "target already existed"; mkdir cargo || echo "cargo already existed"; du -hs target && du -hs cargo; rustc --version && cargo --version; time cargo test --verbose --jobs 1 --release. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that uses the rust:latest image, runs cargo doc then mkdir -p public && cp -r target/doc public/doc && cp -r site/* public/, publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, and runs only on the master branch.
